databaseVectors.note: All existing vectors in DB are 1536-dimensional

pythonEmbedder.note: Supports OpenAI backend fallback via EMBED_BACKEND env var

vectorSearchTest.rootCause: Database vectors are 1536d (OpenAI) but current embedder produces 1024d (Ollama Qwen). pgvector requires matching dimensions for the <=> cosine distance operator.

selfSimilarityTest.method: Pick an existing 1536d vector from DB and search for nearest neighbors using pgvector <=> operator

results.title: Vessels, Heights and Two Versions (Easy Version)
Vessels, Heights and Two Versions (Hard Version)

selfSimilarityTest.note: pgvector ANN search works correctly. Seating Arrangement Easy/Hard versions cluster together (0.9665 similarity) as expected.

errors: CRITICAL: Vector dimension mismatch — DB has 1536d vectors (OpenAI), but backend VectorService and python/llm/embedder.py are configured to use qwen3-embedding:0.6b which produces 1024d vectors. Any vector search via the NestJS backend will fail with 'different vector dimensions 1536 and 1024'.
WARNING: Only 30 out of 7217 problems (0.42%) have vector embeddings. 7187 luogu problems have no vectors.
WARNING: The local embedding server (python/embedding_server.py, BAAI/bge-m3, 1024d) is not running on port 8765.
INFO: OpenAI API key in backend/.env is 'sk-placeholder' — not a real key. Cannot use OpenAI backend for 1536d embeddings.
recommendations: Option A (preferred): Re-embed all problems and solutions with qwen3-embedding:0.6b (1024d) using the Python seed scripts, then restart backend. This aligns the DB with the current codebase config.
Option B: Set EMBED_BACKEND=openai and a valid OPENAI_API_KEY, then re-embed with text-embedding-3-small (1536d) to match existing vectors.
Option C: Start the local embedding server (python/embedding_server.py) and set EMBED_BACKEND to point to it — but this still produces 1024d vectors, so re-embedding is still required.
Run the seed scripts (python/scripts/seed_vectors_luogu.py, seed_vectors_leetcode.py, seed_vectors_codeforces.py) with the chosen embedding backend to populate vectors for all problems.
